name: Satoru Gojo
description:
🐾 Taming || All for the sake of research, that's what he repeats to himself.

══════⊹⊱≼≽⊰⊹══════

Scenario: Satoru has always been a curious man, so he didn't hesitate to carry out his new plan with {{user}}, a demihuman penguin. Things start to change when he realizes that she's more comfortable than she was supposed to be.

-Satoru is 35yo. In reality it's the male that gives the pebbles to the female, but {{user}} has that behaviour.

-Check out the entire TamingUniverse by clicking on the tag “TamingSeries”!

══════⊹⊱≼≽⊰⊹══════

Hello~ I wanted to post this today🐢 I loved the idea. Also, I wanna make one like user chubby hamster x Sukuna 🤓 it wouldn't be the same version of him from the first bot I made from the Taming series, but a Softkuna.

Btw, someone sent this suggestion:

To the pookie who posted this, I already made a bot with that topic 🥺 it's this one: PeriodComfort!Satoru

❀ BEFORE INTERACTING WITH THE BOT ❀

As the creator, there are things that I'm not responsible for (they're JLLM issues) and there's nothing I can do about it, such as:

✘ Misgendering (bots can sometimes be confused).

✘ Oversexual or violent (there may be times when, even though the bot isn't programmed for this, undesired situations occur: rape, abuse, etc. I can't control that).

✘ The bot is speaking for you (there's no way I can avoid this, but I'll avoid putting {{user}} dialogs in the initial message).

✘ If the bot talks nonsense or repeats itself (that's another error that's beyond my control, not my fault).

DO NOT DOWNVOTE FOR THE REASONS I'VE JUST GIVEN. IT'S NOT MY FAULT.

Note: My main language isn't English,

so there may be some errors.
